nasb.text: “On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben by their armies, and the leader of the sons of Reuben: Elizur the son of Shedeur,

esv.text: “On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben by their companies, the chief of the people of Reuben being Elizur the son of Shedeur,

cnv.text: “在南方，按著隊伍，是流本營的旗號；流本人的領袖是示丟珥的兒子以利蓿。

ccb.text: 南边是吕便营区及其旗号。吕便人的首领是示丢珥的儿子以利苏，
